Title: Absolutely GARBAGE WORTHLESS service…
Content: Absolutely GARBAGE service but hey they refunded me for it so at least the customer service is decent. App randomly stopped working for absolutely no reason and wouldn't let me connect anywhere. AND I MEAN ANYWHERE. Tried every supposed fix I could find online before being told I should Uninstall and reinstall... why? So I can have the same issue again in a month? Lmao. Total waste of my time and energy. I have precisely ZERO tolerance left for poorly made software at this point. If it doesn't work consistently you shouldn't even be charging for it.

Title: Amazing support!
Content: Since my retirement I've subscribed to NordVPN and have had several queries -due to my lack of IT expertise, as for the first time in my life I have not had my employer's IT support dealing with all this. The Nord VPN support teams have been brilliant, helping me with all my queries promptly and efficiently. Than you guys!

Title: Reliable and fast connections, security, vigilance.
Content: Reliable and fast connections to every country I've tried. Timely warnings of threats. Essential for torrent sites and useful for securely connecting to overseas bank accounts. Cheap. What's not to like?

Title: Trustpilot is here to help you shape…
Content: Trustpilot is here to help you shape and improve the world. We do it by giving you a powerful, open-to-all review platform where you can share and discover experiences, and connect with businesses to help them improve.The only thing we ask is that you respect and follow these guidelines (together with our Terms of Use) to help us all keep Trustpilot a collaborative and trustworthy place for everyone to enjoy. Thanks for getting on board — let’s upgrade the world!

Title: The Best on the Market
Content: Over the years I’ve been through a maze of different security suppliers and systems.But Nord VNP is truly the best! Really easy to get going and if the tech goes over your head sometimes; just get an email over to them and their support team are with you and help you! This I think is the best in the world at present. However I think they will hold that position as they are constantly improving my experience.

Title: Persevere with Nord VPN - it's worth it.
Content: I finally resolved issues with the connection. Could write an easier setup guide as I know a fair bit about computers and networks but spent hours getting it all going. Isabel helped a lot to resolve problems. It does do what it saids it does but getting your head around the platform takes some effort as I was setting this up on a new router - UDM Pro and there was little on the web to help. All good now.

Title: I tried to make a refund
Content: I tried to make a refund, after I recognized that the 1year subscribtion payment has already been done, and the service team, especially Lola Paca helped a lot on this matter. Great service. Keep going like this! Thanks agian Lola.

Title: I’ve had a terrible experience with…
Content: I’ve had a terrible experience with NordVPN! It’s been months now and it still isn’t working properly, and their support team is completely incompetent. Despite multiple attempts to get help, my issue remains unresolved. They took my money, and once the warranty expired, it stopped working, and they clearly don’t care anymore. Avoid this service at all costs – they just want your money and don’t care about their customers. Run away!

Title: Nord assistance
Content: Got Nord 12 months ago to provide additional protection. Recently had issue needed sorted so used their “help” function. Very prompt response with issue resolved quickly and easily. Given number of customers they have very impressed. Other organisations could learn from them .

Title: Nord needs new program coders
Content: I have been a Nord customer for many years. At first it was an excellent VPN package. Over the last few years, more and more sites block Nord. I even bought a dedicated VPN from them but this was just as bad. I can live with occasional sites blocking Nord but what I cannot live with is that Nord constantly crashes my internet. Also, the dedicated VPN when working slows my speed down by over 50%.I have sent hundreds of logs to them but never any response.........In modern vernacular, Nord suck. I now use my anti virus software VPN which does not crash my internet.

Title: Fast and Easy to set up.
Content: Bernanda helped me set up my VPN to my ASUS router, they helped with all my questions and told me the differences between TCP and UDP for which configuration to upload. Now my Router is with Nord so all my devices are now protected. :)

Title: Multi Factor Authentication problems!
Content: Had a big problem with the Multi Factor Authentication app in Nord VPN. Was locked out of my VPN as a result, with no way to get back in. I contacted the Nord team and they reset everything for me, without any fuss. A really smooth experience and I would definitely recommend Nord VPN to anyone.

Title: While Nord is running
Content: While Nord is running, many sites I attempt to visit time out with a notice saying the site can't be found. When I turn Nord off, the site is available. I've modified my use of Nord to turn it off before going browsing, it saves me a lot of time to browse that way. Once I'm at a site I want, I generally turn Nord back on and the site is still available. Sites being blocked happen with Foxfire and Google Chrome.

Title: Happy to take money despite no intention to use the service
Content: This company practices use human nature to extract money from their customers. The service is good but customer satisfaction is obviously not a company priority and they will refer back to their policies to explain why they are completely inflexible. I wanted to use the service for a month so signed up for that. Their typical model is to provide long period contracts at discount making single months considerably more expensive. They default to having auto-renew enabled.  So of course after using the service for a period of time during the first month I had forgot to cancel before the end of the period.  I noticed 1 day after the renewal date, so cancelled and logged a support ticket requesting a refund,  they said that wasn’t possible and referred to their policies.While they are not obligated to provide a refund, this doesn’t result in a good customer experience, hence I’m giving this 1 star.  I will use another provider next time I need short term use of a VPN service.

Title: Super Customer Service and Troubleshooting
Content: I am very impressed by the customer service that was provided to me this week. I hadn't expected a positive solution to an issue I had experiencied, and I had come up with an acceptable workaround, but I was still very satisfied with the attention the NordVPN team gave to the problem. That they managed to actually solve the issue - making my workaround redundant - is even more impressive.They made the technical stuff understandable for a novice and, by persevering over the course of a number of days, solved the problem.An excellent all-round experience.

Title: NordVPN by far the BEST
Content: I have been using NordVPN for quite a few years now and all I can say is: I love it!!  I have used other VPN I the past but NordVPN is the best by far. So easy to switch countries and enjoy surfing completely safe on the internet.

Title: MOFI router setting issue
Content: A concise and detailed response to my question as to why my MOFI router was not connecting to the VPN server.I had just updated firmware on my MOFI router when I realized it was no longer connecting to the server. I thought it had to do with the firmware updates that I had completed on my router in August. I had even rolled back the firmware updates on my router to see if that was the issue. Since the rollbacks did not work, I sent an email to Nord VPN to see if there was a change in how I should have my settings. They informed me that the server I was using was no longer available and directed me to a page to find a new server. Once I changed to the new server, I had my router connected to Nord VPN again.

Title: Reliable service
Content: Have used the service for 2 or 3 years and found it to be reliable and easy to use across multiple devices. Ongoing annual fee after honeymoon period might be only disincentive for home users.

Title: Nord VPN does exactly what it says and…
Content: Nord VPN does exactly what it says and it does it well. There are servers all over the world to choose from, and you can feel confident and safe with your internet experience.Where they have shined for me and earned my 5-star review is by honoring their refund policy. I lost my job due to hurricane Helene's damage and securing a refund to aid my financial situation was quick and easy. Shout out to Elena on their customer support team for making that happen.

Title: Great advice given
Content: I was able to quickly connect to a chat with NordVPN with a person named "Carlos Martinez".  Very knowledgable person who was extremely professional.

Title: Pathetic Customer Support, Even Worse Technology.
Content: I paid for a subscription, which a month after purchasing still does not work. The engineers still have no idea what the problem is and refuse to refund me and are hiding behind Amazon's T's & C's so that they do not have to return my money for a problem that 6 weeks on they HAVE NO CLUE HOW TO FIX!Update - (ID #16898619)

Title: Our Canadian internet provider is able…
Content: Our Canadian internet provider is able to defeat Nord VPN.  We have sent 3 requests to Nord to help us with this issue without a response; very disappointing.

Title: NordVPN has been a trustworthy and…
Content: NordVPN has been a trustworthy and responsive experience for me.Europe can be difficult with censorship and I can be assured access to everything that I have so far  needed.Plus am not bombarded with promotional requests asking contributions for causes I do not believe in.

Title: Don't get Nord vpn in Spain to see uk tv…
Content: Got Nord vpn in Spain to see uk tv programmes on my firestick. It started well but within 2 days no BBC live, then Channel 4 wouldn't work. I asked Nord they just said no idea when it would be rectified. I asked for a refund they said as I bought it from Amazon they had o responsibility!

Title: needed to change my email from nordpass
Content: needed to change my email from nordpassafter a day of waiting on not getting answers via mail i went to livechat Sara Collado fixed my problem in less then 5mins. 10/10 live-support

Title: Poor support for Visually Impaired users
Content: There was a visual change in my Nord VPN home page which caused me issues (as a visually-impaired user).Nord VPN were contacted with a detailed explanation (plus a photo of the page) but after several exchanges simply did not understand the carefully explained issue.Update - since responding to this posting Nord VPN have indicated the issue cannot be resolved.....

Title: I am extremely satisfied with the…
Content: I am extremely satisfied with the service and professionalism of NordVPN. I made my payment using cryptocurrency, which was a seamless process. However, after completing the payment, I realized that my email address wasn’t functioning, and I couldn’t receive any emails to activate my account.I reached out to their support team and provided the necessary proof of payment, and to my surprise, they managed to change my email address in record time—within just 12 hours! The quick response and solution really impressed me.Additionally, the VPN with a dedicated IP works flawlessly, providing me with reliable and secure connectivity. Thank you, NordVPN, for your excellent support and service!

Title: Customer servicer Ana Duran is great…
Content: Customer servicer Ana Duran is great and helpful. She knows my concerns, and provide very useful advice for me. Love this service!

Title: Great team…great service
Content: I was able to solve my problem with a series of clear, easy-to-follow instructions. As well, the response from the support team was prompt and courteous

Title: excellent service
Content: I had issues with the VPN connection and service desk went out of their way to help. they were straight to the point and after a few interactions everything worked out. Flawless. Congratulations

Title: We have the Nord VPN and security vault…
Content: We have the Nord VPN and security vault tools for family use. It is an excellent and reliable product. As we have so many accounts and travel frequently this is essential for us. We have not needed to use their support services in over 3 years of use.

Title: I feel secure using the Internet
Content: I feel secure using the Internet, knowing that Nord VPN is securing my connection from "snooping eyes". I have not noticed any slow down in my connection while using Nord VPN, either.

Title: Love Nord!
Content: Ease of installation,  use and ongoing support made this product an easy decision to buy.  There has also been no decrease in our connection speed.  Love it!

Title: Had some connection issues but Manuel…
Content: Had some connection issues but Manuel Roman patiently gone trough with them with me All sorted now

Title: Great product- Fit for Purpose
Content: I have been using this service for over 14 months now. I have six items covered which includes 2 televisions, 3 IOS products and 1 Android and the service has been consistent and has not failed me once.. It has always worked when I have been on my travels. Brilliant and highly recommended…

Title: Subscribe to NordVPN right now.
Content: It not only hides my IP, but blocks (most) ads and enables picture-in-picture mode for YouTube videos without a YouTube Premium subscription. Highly recommended.

Title: Been using Nord for years and it’s…
Content: Been using Nord for years and it’s given great service and ease of management on all my devices. Online reviews have given Nord consistent high marks. I highly recommend it to use every time you surf the net!

Title: Excellent customer service
Content: Whilst correspondence is via email, my query was responded to swiftly and the problem was quickly resolved even though it was a Sunday. For such a big company it is so refreshing not to have to deal with a bot or get passed from one department to another. Keep up the good work Nord 👍🏻

Title: I've been using NordVPN for years never…
Content: I've been using NordVPN for years never had a problem Works great I just wish they let me go back to purchasing 3 year plan.

Title: I had a problem with Bitdefender…
Content: I had a problem with Bitdefender blocking some data. Support sent me directions how to fix it, and it worked.
